---
title: "NC-Style Benchmark and Biological Case Figure"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{NC-Style Benchmark and Biological Case Figure}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(benchfigR)
library(ncfigR)

metrics <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/benchmark_metrics.tsv", package = "benchfigR"))
ranks <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/benchmark_ranks.tsv", package = "benchfigR"))
runtime <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/runtime_metrics.tsv", package = "benchfigR"))
robustness <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/robustness_metrics.tsv", package = "benchfigR"))
case <- read_tsv(system.file("extdata/case_embedding.tsv", package = "benchfigR"))

fig <- compose_benchmark_case_figure(metrics, ranks, runtime, robustness, case)
export_figure_bundle(fig, "benchmark_case", out_dir = "figures/exports", width = 7, height = 5)
```
